name: map-gesture-controls
description: Browser-native hand gesture controls for OpenLayers and Google Maps. Pan, zoom, and navigate maps using hand gestures powered by MediaPipe. No backend required.
author: Sander de Snaijer

scripts.build: npm run build:lib --workspace=packages/map-gesture-core && npm run build:lib --workspace=packages/ol-gesture-controls && npm run build:lib --workspace=packages/google-maps-gesture-controls
scripts.docs:build: npm run docs:build-demos && vitepress build docs
